name: Gavis Arenarium
short_description: A scuffle-type action game in which the opponent is attacked and knocked down or pushed out of the game.
detailed_description:
From ancient times to modern times, historically strong people exist in each era, and the heyday of each strong person is different.

Such strongmen gather and start a confrontation. Fight until the last one is left.

"Gavis Arenarium" is a multiplayer melee action game that can be enjoyed with enhanced graphics using Unreal Engine 5. Multiplayer is available using Steam. Players can choose their characters to play the game, and it can be played across different maps. Players must be able to play against other players or by dropping them off the map, and each map has certain events that can send or kill players, so they have to be wary of them. Ultimately, the player who survives will be the winner of that match.

It's still a test version, so please open Steam when you play, log in, turn on the application, and play the game.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

How to operate it

Move - W, A, S, D

Jump - Space bar

Interaction - E

Run - Move + Shift

Attack 1 - LMB (left mouse button)

Attack 2 - RMB (right mouse button)

Attack 3 - S + LMB

Attack 4 - S + RMB

Attack 5 - R

Guard - L Ctrl

Kick (Archer only) - F

Settings Window - ESC, P
